terrain_notes: First pacer leg. Climbing, mostly daylight into evening. Sleep stop at Barker Pass after. Plan assumes Sierra (~52 mi) by midnight at end of Friday (Sat 12:00 AM) and first pacer pickup here ~Sat afternoon.
what_to_bring: GPX of course on your own device
Warm layers — gets cold at altitude

terrain_notes: Combined Barker → Stephen Jones (7.5 mi) + Stephen Jones → Tahoe City (19.4 mi). Stephen Jones is a non-crew aid station mid-leg. Long leg — fresh pacer ideal. Overnight into Sunday.
Big climbing leg — 3,476 ft of gain. Sunday afternoon into evening. Sleep stop at Brockway after.
what_to_bring: Patience — Harvey will be deep in the pain cave by here

terrain_notes: Mostly descent (3,142 ft loss). Sunday night into Monday morning. Watch for quad fatigue on the downhill.
Longest sustained climb of the back half. Monday morning. Hardest mental leg on the plan.
Closer leg. ~18 miles to the buckle. Monday late morning into evening finish (plan ~6 PM). Strong pacer ideal — keep the wheels on.
